Medicaid-expansion CHIP and separate CHIP.
What does this file include? (variable highlights)
- As appropriate for the type of service on the record:- Diagnosis codes
- Procedure code

- Charges and payments
- Provider identifiers
Special considerations
- Encounter data reporting may vary by state, year and eligibility group.
- CMS continues to work with states to address data quality issues. In addition to preliminary and fully mature files, CMS may provide updated releases of the files for a
